item.title: 🚀 SHAFT 10.3.20260710: What's New and Why You Should Upgrade Today
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT 10.3.20260710 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from
  • SHAFTENGINE should read the
  • modular SHAFT upgrade guide.
  • SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis,
  • reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled

👉 View the full release on GitHub

📋 Changelog​

SHAFT 10.3.20260710

Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from SHAFT_ENGINE should read the modular SHAFT upgrade guide.

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

What's Changed​

  • Fix scheduled E2E CI failures: shaft-sikulix opencv, stale test expectation, Appium install race by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3408
  • Fix SHAFT Assistant timeouts, approve-all checkbox, approval-box overflow, and recorder stop by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3410
  • SHAFT Assistant: real interactive local-agent approval, richer Verbose detail, fix mid-run toggle by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3411
  • Portable setup, deep Test Connection, verbose passthrough, and recorder/codegen fixes (closes #3409) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3418

Full Changelog: https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/compare/10.3.20260709...10.3.20260710

🏆 Community Spotlight​

This release was made possible by 46 amazing contributors who have poured their time and expertise into making SHAFT better for everyone.

Open source thrives because of people like these. Every bug fix, every feature, every review — it all counts.

  • @MohabMohie
  • @MahmoudElSharkawy
  • @MennaMagedm
  • @AhmdZanoon
  • @MustafaAgamy
  • @magdyheiba
  • @Mochxd
  • @KyrillosNageh
  • @amfarid
  • @Mohab-Osama
  • @RihamMostafa
  • @MhmdElGazzar
  • @MohamedHazem95
  • @mohamedtawfek05354
  • @samiir95
  • @MamdouhMansour
  • @Kinasr
  • @MahmoudMabrok
  • @hammad101088
  • @ieZaky
  • @sys123-data
  • @georgii-musikhin
  • @hjsblogger
  • @xValenciax
  • @MarwaYoussef1
  • @sultanpaymob
  • @osamaayman1005
  • @Salma2018170
  • @TarekGaafar
  • @Waleedmohammed
  • @khaledskhamis
  • @themosaeed
  • @wesamhamed
  • @DavidIshakGorgy
  • @BojteTamas
  • @blacelle
  • @Ayanasrallah
  • @AmrAdelElkholy
  • @ammaralfaqi11
  • @amlosman
  • @ahmednasr95
  • @ahmed-madyan
  • @AhmedHelalyy
  • @A-Alii
  • @AbdelrahmanFahd
  • @Abdelrhman-Ellithy

🚀 Get Started in Seconds​

Import the SHAFT BOM once, then use the modular engine:

<dependencyManagement>
  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>io.github.shafthq</groupId>
      <artifactId>shaft-bom</artifactId>
      <version>10.3.20260710</version>
      <type>pom</type>
      <scope>import</scope>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>
</dependencyManagement>

<dependencies>
  <dependency>
    <groupId>io.github.shafthq</groupId>
    <artifactId>shaft-engine</artifactId>
  </dependency>
</dependencies>

💬 Join the Conversation​

We'd love to hear what you think! Found a bug? Have an idea? Just want to say hi?

  • ⭐ Star SHAFT on GitHub — it helps more than you think
  • 💡 Start a Discussion — share feedback or ideas
  • 🐛 Report an Issue — help us squash bugs faster
  • 📖 Read the Docs — dive deeper into SHAFT

Thanks for being part of the SHAFT journey. Until the next release — happy testing! 🎯

Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

What's Changed​

  • Fix broken release-publish event chain and tighten CI workflow scope by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3388
  • Delete redundant sync-sample-projects-version.yml workflow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3392
  • Audit and optimize agentic config: fix stale memory, add bounded delegation exception by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3391
  • Fix agentic config enhancements from issue #3390 by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3394
  • Fix SHAFT Capture recorder: process churn, duplicate actions, orphaned placeholder by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3395
  • Harden SHAFT IntelliJ plugin against non-SHAFT projects and misleading MCP results by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3396
  • Fix remaining non-SHAFT-project hardening follow-ups (#3397) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3400

item.title: 🚀 SHAFT 10.3.20260708: What's New and Why You Should Upgrade Today
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT 10.3.20260708 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from
  • SHAFTENGINE should read the
  • modular SHAFT upgrade guide.
  • SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis,
  • reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled

👉 View the full release on GitHub

📋 Changelog​

SHAFT 10.3.20260708

Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from SHAFT_ENGINE should read the modular SHAFT upgrade guide.

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

What's Changed​

  • Record API Web: network capture data model, web interceptor, MCP tools, IntelliJ action (P1/4) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3357
  • Record API Web: ApiCaptureGenerator codegen + response validation (P2/4) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3359
  • Record API + Web: mobile API capture via embedded MITM proxy (P3/4) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3360
  • Record API Web P4 + Trace Viewer/Sharding/IDE/A11y/Visual/HAR/Planner (#3346 P4, #3347-#3351) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3361
  • Ways-of-working v2: full 13-item implementation — hooks, gates, workflow surgery, feature-dev (#3367) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3368
  • Fix IntelliJ plugin onboarding flow (#3363) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3366
  • IntelliJ plugin: Gemini cloud provider setup + model/effort selection (#3369) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3371
  • IntelliJ plugin: interactive tool approval, agent approval forwarding, expert mode + factory reset (#3370) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3373
  • Fix /record-web session loss, stop, and guided assertion flow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3374
  • Fix CaptureManager.isAssetResource() no-op against real capture data by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3377
  • Stop Maven Central CD from failing between releases by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3376
  • Fix stale MCP tool manifest and isolate mobile capture CA in tests by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3379
  • Close remaining #3347 gaps: trace screenshots, IntelliJ trace viewer, sharded merge by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3380
  • Fix mobile capture CA directory permissions breaking Linux CI by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3381
  • Fix recorder overlay toolbar misclicks from bottom-anchored panel growth by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3384
  • Add aria-snapshot assertions and visual regression baselines (#3349) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3383
  • Add PR-triggered browser E2E coverage for shaft-capture by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3386
  • Back off SHAFT Capture polling collector once BiDi is proven healthy by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3387
  • Fix release-publish event chain broken by GITHUB_TOKEN anti-recursion by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3389

Full Changelog: https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/compare/10.3.20260707...10.3.20260708

🏆 Community Spotlight​

This release was made possible by 46 amazing contributors who have poured their time and expertise into making SHAFT better for everyone.

Open source thrives because of people like these. Every bug fix, every feature, every review — it all counts.

  • @MohabMohie
  • @MahmoudElSharkawy
  • @MennaMagedm
  • @AhmdZanoon
  • @MustafaAgamy
  • @magdyheiba
  • @Mochxd
  • @KyrillosNageh
  • @amfarid
  • @Mohab-Osama
  • @RihamMostafa
  • @MhmdElGazzar
  • @MohamedHazem95
  • @mohamedtawfek05354
  • @samiir95

  • @MahmoudMabrok
  • @hammad101088
  • @ieZaky
  • @sys123-data
  • @georgii-musikhin
  • @hjsblogger
  • @xValenciax
  • @MarwaYoussef1
  • @sultanpaymob
  • @osamaayman1005
  • @Salma2018170
  • @TarekGaafar
  • @Waleedmohammed
  • @khaledskhamis
  • @themosaeed
  • @wesamhamed
  • @DavidIshakGorgy
  • @BojteTamas
  • @blacelle
  • @Ayanasrallah
  • @AmrAdelElkholy
  • @ammaralfaqi11
  • @amlosman
  • @ahmednasr95
  • @ahmed-madyan
  • @AhmedHelalyy
  • @A-Alii

item.title: 🚀 SHAFT 10.3.20260707: What's New and Why You Should Upgrade Today
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT 10.3.20260707 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from
  • SHAFTENGINE should read the
  • modular SHAFT upgrade guide.
  • SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis,
  • reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled

👉 View the full release on GitHub

📋 Changelog​

SHAFT 10.3.20260707

Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from SHAFT_ENGINE should read the modular SHAFT upgrade guide.

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

What's Changed​

  • Fix deprecation warnings in shaft-pilot-core and shaft-mcp by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3291
  • Adopt agentic skills/MCP tooling (partial implementation of #3292) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3298
  • Generalize Allure test-result gating across all 6 pilot modules by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3299
  • Implement agent hierarchy + skill-composition workflows (#3300) by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3301
  • Show a visible indicator when conversation context is truncated by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3307
  • Categorize MCP invocation errors and add recovery guidance in IntelliJ plugin by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3308
  • Add a 0-100 confidence score to Doctor AI advisories by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3303
  • Re-render Assistant transcript on IDE theme switch by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3304
  • Bring natural_act semantic actions to mobile by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3305
  • Add MCP subprocess heartbeat and proactive reconnect affordance by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3306
  • Fix: Persist healing history across runs and track acceptance rate by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3309
  • Fix: Gate natural_act AI fallback behind a deterministic confidence threshold by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3310
  • Fix: Redact sensitive regions in screenshot evidence before AI analysis by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3312
  • Show progress for Test MCP and Refresh Tools background actions by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3313
  • Fix: Harden installer version argument handling for end-to-end command execution by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3328
  • Extend installer to fetch agent validation script with skills by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3330
  • Strip .perform() from generated and remediation code paths by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3329
  • Redesign recorder overlay with single assertion entry point and scored locators by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3331
  • Upgrade AssistantLocalAgentRunner with real-time streaming, token usage parsing, and auto-compact by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3332
  • Fix four rendering defects in ShaftAssistantPanel by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3335
  • Fix: Make wizard-step background continuous and remove label size clamps by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3337
  • Serve guidance tools on stdio manifest fixture by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3338
  • Suppress editing keys in text inputs and coalesce into final value by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3334
  • Fix: ShaftMcpSetupPanel wizard-step background continuity and label cropping by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3336
  • Guard SHAFT.Properties initialization in McpMobileToolchainService by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3333
  • Remove generated Allure/report artifacts committed by mistake by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3340
  • Remove committed per-installation UUID files and stray local Allure script by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3341
  • Rehydrate recorder step list across cross-origin navigations and harden loopback CORS preflight by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3342
  • Fix release-candidate build blocker and shaft-mcp static-cache init gap by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3345
  • Add experimental SSH shell and PTY support (Part of #3132) by @Mochxd in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3220
  • Document reusable SSH terminal lifecycle, SFTP, forwarding, and JSch notes (Part of ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE#3133) by @Mochxd in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3239
  • Fix saved Workflow scripts to use top-level args instead of exported run() by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3352
  • Fix custom.properties mis-copy from bundled jar in external installs by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3354
  • Make workflow implementer/fixer/escalator prompts commit their work by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3356

Full Changelog: https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/compare/10.3.20260705...10.3.20260707

🏆 Community Spotlight​

This release was made possible by 46 amazing contributors who have poured their time and expertise into making SHAFT better for everyone.

Open source thrives because of people like these. Every bug fix, every feature, every review — it all counts.

  • @mohamedtawfek05354
  • @samiir95
  • @MamdouhMansour
  • @Kinasr
  • @MahmoudMabrok

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

  • [codex] Add IntelliJ MCP first-run setup by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3170
  • [codex] Enhance IntelliJ assistant provider routing by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3172
  • [codex] Fix IntelliJ MCP first-run project scoping by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3174
  • Improve SHAFT IntelliJ assistant UX by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3175
  • [codex] Record SHAFT IntelliJ first-run video by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3177
  • Improve IntelliJ assistant response rendering and chat sessions by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3183
  • Add optional SikuliX module and Windows desktop E2E flows by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3184
  • [codex] Support DPI-tolerant image actions by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3187
  • MCP installer rerunnable and streaming output by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3186
  • Fix IntelliJ assistant onboarding flow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3189
  • [codex] Improve IntelliJ onboarding assistant UX by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3191
  • [codex] Finalize IntelliJ assistant onboarding follow-ups by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3192
  • Fix IntelliJ recording Gradle fallback by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3193
  • [codex] fix Dependabot vulnerable transitives by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3195
  • [codex] Fix IntelliJ capture approval workflow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3196
  • [codex] Prepare IntelliJ plugin release by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3198
  • Fix Jackson security dependency by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3200
  • feat(intellij): expose SHAFT MCP chat commands by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3211
  • [codex] Centralize IntelliJ Assistant command registry by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3212
  • [codex] Route IntelliJ assistant setup-aware commands by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3213
  • Modernize IntelliJ assistant icon controls by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3214
  • IntelliJ Assistant browser control by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3221
  • Add Playwright recording backend and route Assistant capture commands to correct recorder by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3222
  • Codex/issue 3207 mobile assistant by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3223
  • Finalize mobile Assistant recording workflows by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3225
  • IntelliJ Assistant: route Doctor aliases and render Doctor reports as Markdown by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3226
  • Add natural MCP productivity commands to IntelliJ Assistant by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3227
  • Polish IntelliJ Assistant command hint UI by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3228
  • [codex] Finalize IntelliJ assistant icon-only controls by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3229
  • [codex] Improve IntelliJ MCP setup status flow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3231
  • [codex] Fix IntelliJ recording JDK preflight by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3238
  • [codex] Render IntelliJ assistant chat as Markdown by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3241
  • Add deterministic release PR workflow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3242
  • [codex] Fix IntelliJ capture agent completion feedback by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3243
  • [codex] Prompt agent guidance optimization after MCP setup by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3250
  • [codex] Improve IntelliJ onboarding sample generation by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3252
  • Enhance release PR internal version updates by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3253
  • Handle malformed Doctor reports in MCP tools by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3254
  • [codex] Fix shaft-sikulix Maven Central dependency convergence by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3255

item.title: 🚀 SHAFT 10.2.20260628: What's New and Why You Should Upgrade Today
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT 10.2.20260628 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from
  • SHAFTENGINE should read the
  • modular SHAFT upgrade guide.
  • SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis,
  • reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled

👉 View the full release on GitHub

📋 Changelog​

SHAFT 10.2.20260628

Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from SHAFT_ENGINE should read the modular SHAFT upgrade guide.

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

What's Changed​

  • docs: simplify README with theme-aware logo by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3144
  • [codex] remove graphify traces by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3145

  • chore: optimize project memory by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3150
  • docs: optimize modular era feature catalog by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3149
  • Add IntelliJ plugin beta integration by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3151
  • Add MCP-backed project tools to IntelliJ plugin by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3152
  • Document IntelliJ plugin in feature catalog by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3153
  • Prepare SHAFT Engine release 10.2.20260628 by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/3154

item.title: 🚀 SHAFT 10.2.20260620: What's New and Why You Should Upgrade Today
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT 10.2.20260620 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from
  • SHAFTENGINE should read the
  • modular SHAFT upgrade guide.
  • SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis,
  • reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled

👉 View the full release on GitHub

📋 Changelog​

SHAFT 10.2.20260620

Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from SHAFT_ENGINE should read the modular SHAFT upgrade guide.

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

What's Changed​

  • Enforce remote WebDriver session timeout by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2940
  • Avoid android-json verifier conflicts after upgrade by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2941
  • [codex] Add deterministic AI test lifecycle artifacts by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2939
  • Enhance SHAFT upgrader project detection by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2942
  • [codex] Remember Memory and graphify CLI workflow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2943
  • [codex] Remove duplicated project generator by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2944
  • [codex] Remove duplicated project generator by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2946
  • Fix Windows Surefire properties bootstrap on Windows by @Mochxd in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2945
  • [codex] Preserve jar Log4j config paths by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2947
  • [codex] Update Surefire validation memory by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2948
  • [codex] Fix retry GIF screenshot policy by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2949
  • Improve typed action Allure reporting by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2950
  • [codex] Remove typed action txt parameter by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2951
  • [codex] Unify element action failure reporting by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2952
  • [codex] Remove duplicate smart locator element name by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2953
  • [codex] Add coverage tests by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2954
  • send SSH keep-alive packets during long remote terminal sessions by @Mochxd in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2926
  • fix: normalize smart locator reporting metadata by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2959
  • [codex] Fix shaft MCP desktop client runtime by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2960
  • [codex] Fix duplicate shaft MCP installer banner by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2961
  • [codex] Standardize new task PR flow by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2962
  • [codex] Stabilize terminal actions temp directory cleanup by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2963
  • [codex] Document Windows python launcher fallback by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2967
  • [codex] Pin tools jackson core by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2966
  • Migrate core execution lifecycle to JUnit internals by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2968
  • [codex] Add capture codegen workbench and agent handoff by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2969
  • Add MCP Selenium healer tool by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2970
  • Add official guide search MCP tool by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2971
  • Merge validation helper implementations by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2972
  • Fix Android pulled file byte assertion by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2973
  • Implement bounded TODO fixes and prepare 10.2.20260620 release by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2974

item.title: 🚀 SHAFT 10.2.20260614: What's New and Why You Should Upgrade Today
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT 10.2.20260614 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from
  • SHAFTENGINE should read the
  • modular SHAFT upgrade guide.
  • SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis,
  • reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled

👉 View the full release on GitHub

📋 Changelog​

SHAFT 10.2.20260614

Auto-generated release notes are included below. Users upgrading from SHAFT_ENGINE should read the modular SHAFT upgrade guide.

SHAFT Pilot adds deterministic Capture, TestNG generation, Doctor diagnosis, reviewed repair proposals, and MCP interoperability. AI is optional, disabled by default, and direct OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Ollama access requires explicit enablement and consent. Microsoft/GitHub Copilot integrates through MCP rather than a generic provider API-key adapter.

See the SHAFT Pilot guide for installation, configuration, privacy, troubleshooting, and usage examples.

What's Changed​

  • fix: link SHAFT MCP image to canonical repository by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2876
  • fix: publish SHAFT MCP from canonical GHCR package by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2877
  • [codex] Optimize agent guidance for lower context usage by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2878
  • docs: record optional MCP hosting status by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2879
  • [codex] Add deterministic SHAFT Heal module by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2880
  • [codex] consolidate SHAFT documentation on Docusaurus by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2889
  • [codex] preserve documentation delivery standards by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2890
  • add SFTP upload and download to remote terminal by @Mochxd in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2891
  • ci: restore Codecov uploads after every test run by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2893
  • add SSH port forwarding to remote terminal by @Mochxd in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2892
  • Fix canonical documentation link in default properties template by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2894
  • Refactor casing and optimize logging and screenshot handling by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2895
  • [codex] release 10.2.20260614 by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/pull/2896

Full Changelog: https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/compare/10.2.20260612...10.2.20260614

🏆 Community Spotlight​

This release was made possible by 45 amazing contributors who have poured their time and expertise into making SHAFT better for everyone.

Open source thrives because of people like these. Every bug fix, every feature, every review — it all counts.

  • @MohabMohie
  • @MahmoudElSharkawy
  • @MennaMagedm
  • @AhmdZanoon
  • @MustafaAgamy
  • @magdyheiba
  • @amfarid
  • @KyrillosNageh
  • @Mochxd
  • @Mohab-Osama
  • @RihamMostafa
  • @MhmdElGazzar
  • @MohamedHazem95
  • @mohamedtawfek05354
  • @samiir95
  • @MamdouhMansour
  • @Kinasr
  • @MahmoudMabrok
  • @hammad101088
  • @ieZaky
  • @sys123-data
  • @georgii-musikhin
  • @hjsblogger

  • @MarwaYoussef1

  • @osamaayman1005

  • @Waleedmohammed
  • @khaledskhamis
  • @themosaeed
  • @wesamhamed

🚀 Get Started in Seconds​

Import the SHAFT BOM once, then use the modular engine:

<dependencyManagement>
  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>io.github.shafthq</groupId>
      <artifactId>shaft-bom</artifactId>
      <version>10.2.20260614</version>
      <type>pom</type>
      <scope>import</scope>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>
</dependencyManagement>

<dependencies>
  <dependency>
    <groupId>io.github.shafthq</groupId>
    <artifactId>shaft-engine</artifactId>
  </dependency>
</dependencies>

item.content:encoded:
Hey there, SHAFT community! 👋

A fresh release just dropped and it's packed with improvements you don't want to miss. SHAFT_ENGINE 10.2.20260605 is here, and whether you're a seasoned SHAFT user or just getting started, there's something in this release for you.

⚡ What Changed?​

  • Auto-generated release notes for this version are included below.
  • Refactor engine bootstrap & properties; centralize version BOMs and update dependencies by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFTENGINE/pull/2786
  • Bump Allure/Jackson/BrowserStack versions and require publishing @codex plan comment in AGENTS.md by @MohabMohie in https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFTENGINE/pull/2787
